title: Vitax Slug Gone Wool Pellets, Natural, Organic Barrier To Protect Borders, Pots & Containers From Slugs And Snails, Long Lasting - 1L
features: ORGANIC SLUG SOLUTION: Vitax Slug Gone is the natural way to keep slugs and snails away from plants. Popular amongst environmentally-conscious and organic gardeners, Slug Gone is 100% natural and made from British wool.

ADDS NUTRIENTS TO THE SOIL: Slug Gone is applied to the soil below the plant to create a irritating, absorbent mat that works as a natural slug repellent. It prevents slugs and snails from reaching the plant, whilst adding nutrients to the soil and locking in moisture.
MULTI USE: Suitable for use on fruit, veg and flowers, and in borders, pots, containers and hanging baskets.
CHEMICAL FREE: Natural, chemical-free Slug Gone wool pellets are the ideal choice for use in family gardens. The pellets are also harmless to birds, bees and wildlife.

EASY TO USE: To deter slugs and other gastropods, simply lay the pellets around the stems of plants. For best results, add Slug Gone in a 10cm radius around the plant, then add water to cause the fibres to bond.
description: From the manufacturer Stops Slugs and Snails in Their Tracks Wool Pellets Form a Protective Barrier Simply place the wool pellets around your plants. The pellets form a natural barrier that irritates the slug's foot and keeps them from reaching your plants No Poison: Suitable for Organic Gardening Made from nothing but British Wool, Slug Gone is a fully biodegradable product, certified by the Soil Association and suitable for organic gardening. Safe for Children, Pets and Growing Food As an all-natural, chemical-free barrier, Slug Gone is safe for the use on fruit and vegetable plants and in gardens where children and pets are present. Protects, Fertilises and Reduces Weeds Deters slugs & snails Reduces weed growth Releases nitrogen, potassium and sulphur Retains soil moisture Reduces water evaporation Made in the UK Suitable for Organic Gardening The natural way to keep slugs at bay: made from nothing but 100% wool, Slug Gone is the ideal choice for all organic gardeners. Certified by the Soil Association Protecting the earth starts from the ground up. Slug Gone is certified (license # AL 22241) for the health of our soils. The Right Choice for Fruit and Vegetable Gardens As a chemical-free product , Slug Gone is the ideal choice to protect your fruits and vegetables from slugs and snails, without contaminating the soil. Safe for Children, Pets and Wildlife Natural , chemical-free Slug Gone wool pellets are the ideal choice for use in family gardens. The pellets are also completely harmless to birds, bees and wildlife.
